# Project Scope Template

## Project Target
What stable top-level objective is this repository or project serving?

## Current Target
What narrower objective is being actively advanced now?

## Current Phase Goal
What must the current phase achieve?

## In Scope
What is included in the current phase?

## Out of Scope
What is explicitly excluded?

## Key Constraints
What constraints shape the phase?

## Current Assumptions
What assumptions are currently being made?

## Open Risks
What is still uncertain or risky?
